---
title: 'A Book Review:: The Girl Who Stole Tomorrow (S-Impact Book 1) Kindle Edition by D.B. McDowell (Author)'
date: '2016-07-18T03:41:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'LIFE in Review (s)'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7973422227906777611'
blogger_filename: '/2016/07/a-book-review-girl-who-stole-tomorrow-s.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/LIFE in Review (s)/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Fun'
  - 'Discover'
---

<div>
<br /></div>
<h3>
A Book Review::&nbsp;</h3>
<br />
<h4>
<a href="http://amzn.to/29TESZ2" target="_blank">The Girl Who Stole Tomorrow</a> (S-Impact Book 1) Kindle Edition&nbsp;by <a href="https://www.amazon.com/s/ref=dp_byline_sr_ebooks_1?ie=UTF8&amp;text=D.B.+McDowell&amp;search-alias=digital-text&amp;field-author=D.B.+McDowell&amp;sort=relevancerank" target="_blank">D.B. McDowell</a> (Author)</h4>
<div>
<br />
<div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/s-impact-14c6ec3afabc.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/s-impact-76ddabb1b6ec.jpg" width="200" /></a></div>
<br /></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="margin: 0in;">
<h4 style="font-family: georgia;">
<span style="font-family: inherit;">Overview</span></h4>
<blockquote class="tr_bq" style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;;">
Book description: <i>As Seeker 13, Alycia Saldevia is committed to her job fighting the seijinâ€”an elemental race that decimated the surface of Vantros nearly 175 circuits ago. Since she was a child, Alycia dreamed of fighting back against the monsters that drove humanity underground. But her dreams are shattered when she makes a horrifying discovery.&nbsp;</i></blockquote>
<br />
In the great tradition of &nbsp;<a href="http://amzn.to/2alXkYb" target="_blank">Ender's Game</a> by Orson Scott Card, <a href="http://amzn.to/29NIEBj" target="_blank">The Girl Who Stole Tomorrow</a> takes you on an epic Dystopian adventure where nothing is as it seems, friends are enemies are friends, and the entire world unravels by the triumphant tragic end.&nbsp;</div>
<div style="margin: 0in;">
<br />
At times a bit darker than my normal tastes would have allowed, a book full of this much loss somehow still manages to leave you feeling full of hope for tomorrow as each page turns.</div>
<div style="margin: 0in;">
<br />
The author, D.B. McDowell, does a marvelous job pulling the thread of the tapestry as it unravels through tragedy after tragedy, while weaving beneath the pages an end you don't expect.<br />
<br />
There were two scenes in my mind that would make this a PG-13 read, not for younger audiences. IF this were a movie it might be rated higher, but the author does a good job of giving you enough, but not too much.<br />
<br />
I typically like to give the good and the bad, but honestly... this was an amazing read. One of the best stories I've read in a very long time.&nbsp;</div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br />
Disclosure: I received a copy of this book for free with a request to review the book. The review is my open and honest opinion.&nbsp;<span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot;;">Buy it on Amazon (</span><a href="http://amzn.to/29TESZ2" style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;;" target="_blank">Affiliate Link Here</a><span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot;;">)</span><br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot;;"><br /></span></div>
<div style="font-family: Georgia; margin: 0in;">
<br /></div>
<div style="text-align: center;">
********</div>
<br />
<b>By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></b><br />
<br />
New Here?<br />
<br />
<br />
<ul>
<li><a href="http://wolfefamilyreviews.blogspot.com/p/start-here.html" target="_blank">Start Here</a></li>
<li><a href="http://wolfefamilyreviews.blogspot.com/p/resources.html" target="_blank">Resources</a></li>
<li><a href="http://wolfefamilyreviews.blogspot.com/p/who-am-i.html" target="_blank">Who am I?</a></li>
<li>More of my sites at <a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/by-darrell.html" target="_blank">DarrellWolfe.com</a></li>
</ul>
<div>
<br /></div>
</div>
</div>
